message:
fix: remove visible background from pin and collapse sidebar buttons (#3787) (#3807)

Remove bg-background from the collapse and pin buttons so they have
transparent backgrounds at rest, matching the close button and waffle
icon. Hover states remain unchanged (hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10).

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
